creator: slasiewski@lbl.gov
text:
The FreeBSD port mail/mailman is currently at version 2.1.14_x [1]

In June 13, 2012, Mailman version 2.1.15 was released. See [2] and [3].

Please update Mailman in to version 2.1.15

[1] http://www.freshports.org/mail/mailman/
[2] http://www.gnu.org/software/mailman/index.html
[3] http://mail.python.org/pipermail/mailman-announce/2012-June/000174.html
